memberdef.type: boost::signals2::signal< bool(MouseButton btn, int modifier), SignalStopHandler >
memberdef.definition: using MR::ViewerSignals::MouseUpDownSignal = boost::signals2::signal<bool( MouseButton btn, int modifier ), SignalStopHandler>
memberdef.name: MouseUpDownSignal

briefdescription.para: Mouse events.

memberdef.type: boost::signals2::signal< bool(int x, int y), SignalStopHandler >
memberdef.definition: using MR::ViewerSignals::MouseMoveSignal = boost::signals2::signal<bool( int x, int y ), SignalStopHandler>
memberdef.name: MouseMoveSignal

memberdef.definition: using MR::ViewerSignals::MouseScrollSignal = boost::signals2::signal<bool( float delta ), SignalStopHandler>
memberdef.name: MouseScrollSignal

briefdescription.para: Cursor enters/leaves.

detaileddescription.para: signal is called when mouse is being dragged with button down

memberdef.type: boost::signals2::signal< bool(unsigned unicodeKey, int modifier), SignalStopHandler >
memberdef.definition: using MR::ViewerSignals::CharPressedSignal = boost::signals2::signal<bool( unsigned unicodeKey, int modifier ), SignalStopHandler>
memberdef.name: CharPressedSignal

briefdescription.para: Keyboard event.

memberdef.type: boost::signals2::signal< bool(int key, int modifier), SignalStopHandler >
memberdef.definition: using MR::ViewerSignals::KeySignal = boost::signals2::signal<bool( int key, int modifier ), SignalStopHandler>
memberdef.name: KeySignal

memberdef.type: boost::signals2::signal< bool(const Vector3f &translate, const Vector3f &rotate), SignalStopHandler >
memberdef.definition: using MR::ViewerSignals::SpaceMouseMoveSignal = boost::signals2::signal<bool( const Vector3f& translate, const Vector3f& rotate ), SignalStopHandler>
memberdef.name: SpaceMouseMoveSignal

briefdescription.para: SpaceMouseEvents.

detaileddescription.para: signal is called when key is pressed for some time

briefdescription.para: Render events.

detaileddescription.para: signal is called when spacemouse key is pressed for some time

memberdef.type: boost::signals2::signal< void(const std::vector< std::shared_ptr< Object > > &objs, const std::string &errors, const std::string &warnings)>
memberdef.definition: using MR::ViewerSignals::ObjectsLoadedSignal = boost::signals2::signal<void( const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<Object>>& objs, const std::string& errors, const std::string& warnings )>
memberdef.name: ObjectsLoadedSignal

briefdescription.para: Scene events.

detaileddescription.para: signal is called after scene draw

memberdef.definition: using MR::ViewerSignals::DragDropSignal = boost::signals2::signal<bool( const std::vector<std::filesystem::path>& paths ), SignalStopHandler>
memberdef.name: DragDropSignal

memberdef.definition: using MR::ViewerSignals::PostResizeSignal = boost::signals2::signal<void( int x, int y )>
memberdef.name: PostResizeSignal

memberdef.definition: using MR::ViewerSignals::PostRescaleSignal = boost::signals2::signal<void( float xscale, float yscale )>
memberdef.name: PostRescaleSignal

briefdescription.para: Touch signals.

detaileddescription.para: signal is called before close window (return true will prevent closing)

briefdescription.para: Touchpad gesture events.

detaileddescription.para: signal is called when touch stops

memberdef.type: boost::signals2::signal< bool(float deltaX, float deltaY, bool kinetic), SignalStopHandler >
memberdef.definition: using MR::ViewerSignals::TouchpadSwipeGestureUpdateSignal = boost::signals2::signal<bool( float deltaX, float deltaY, bool kinetic ), SignalStopHandler>
memberdef.name: TouchpadSwipeGestureUpdateSignal

memberdef.type: boost::signals2::signal< bool(float scale, bool kinetic), SignalStopHandler >
memberdef.definition: using MR::ViewerSignals::TouchpadZoomGestureUpdateSignal = boost::signals2::signal<bool( float scale, bool kinetic ), SignalStopHandler>
memberdef.name: TouchpadZoomGestureUpdateSignal

briefdescription.para: Window focus signal.

detaileddescription.para: signal is called on touchpad zoom gesture end

briefdescription.para: Before shutdown signal.
signal is called on mouse down
signal is called on mouse up
signal is called on mouse move, note that input x and y are in screen space

detaileddescription.para: signal is called on mouse is scrolled High-level mouse events for clicks and dragging, emitted by MouseController When mouseClickSignal has connections, a small delay for click detection is introduced into camera operations and dragging Dragging starts if dragStartSignal is handled (returns true), and ends on button release When dragging is active, dragSignal and dragEndSignal are emitted instead of mouseMove and mouseUp mouseDown handler have priority over dragStart

briefdescription.para: signal is called when mouse button is pressed and immediately released
signal is called when mouse button is pressed (deferred if click behavior is on)
signal is called when mouse button used to start drag is released
signal is called when unicode char on/is down/pressed for some time
signal is called on key up
signal is called on key down
signal is called on spacemouse 3d controller (joystick) move
signal is called on spacemouse key down
signal is called on spacemouse key up
signal is called before viewports cleanup and camera setup, so one can customize camera XFs for this frame
signal is called before scene draw (but after scene setup)
signal is called before scene draw but after viewport.preDraw()
signal is called on scene draw (after objects tree but before viewport.postDraw())
signal is called after scene draw but after before viewport.postDraw()
signal is called when objects are loaded by Viewer::loadFiles function
signal is called on drag enter/leave the window
signal is called on drag coordinate changed
signal is called on drag and drop file
signal is called after window resize
signal is called after window rescale
signal is called when any touch starts
signal is called when touch moves
signal is called on touchpad rotate gesture beginning
signal is called on touchpad rotate gesture update
signal is called on touchpad rotate gesture end
signal is called on touchpad swipe gesture beginning
signal is called on touchpad swipe gesture update
signal is called on touchpad swipe gesture end
signal is called on touchpad zoom gesture beginning
signal is called on touchpad zoom gesture update
